abstract: Comprehensive performance optimization guide for Node.js native addons written in C++, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 38 rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (JS/C++ boundary optimization, memory management, async threading) to medium (N-API patterns, build configuration). Each rule includes detailed explanations, real-world examples comparing incorrect vs. correct implementations, and specific impact metrics to guide automated refactoring and code generation.
